metadata.notes: Lightweight skill-creator-style evaluation for PR #2. This benchmark compares expected workflow behavior available in origin/main versus the PR branch by static artifact review, not live agent transcripts.

expectations.text: References roadmap contracts as hard constraints
expectations.evidence: Existing bt-roadmap/bt-feat-design already used roadmap hard constraints.

expectations.text: Writes execution mode and behavior delta sections when relevant
expectations.evidence: origin/main lacks the finalized behavior delta and execution-mode contracts.
origin/main lacks context manifest generation.

expectations.text: Does not skip user review before implementation
expectations.evidence: Existing design workflow has review gate.

expectations.text: References roadmap contracts as hard constraints
expectations.evidence: ai-workflow roadmap contracts are read by feature design artifacts.

expectations.text: Writes execution mode and behavior delta sections when relevant
expectations.evidence: bt-feat-design and reference templates include execution mode and Behavior Delta.
bt-feat-design requires impl/check JSONL manifests for standard approved designs.

expectations.text: Does not skip user review before implementation
expectations.evidence: Existing review gate preserved; design artifacts remain approved before implementation.
origin/main has no impl-context manifest contract.
Existing bt-feat-impl follows checklist order.
origin/main lacks Implementation Review Gate.
origin/main has no explicit implementation-review evidence gate before acceptance.
bt-feat-impl startup reads impl-context and required rows block missing files.
Existing behavior preserved.
Implementation Review Gate reference and bt-feat-impl completion report require it.
bt-feat-accept startup checks implementation review evidence.
origin/main has no check-context manifest contract.
origin/main lacks implementation review gate.
origin/main lacks Behavior Delta materialization.

expectations.text: Updates roadmap item and main roadmap doc
expectations.evidence: Existing acceptance writes roadmap state.
origin/main has no worklog/report-feed closeout prompt.
bt-feat-accept startup checks check-context required rows.
bt-feat-accept startup requires Implementation Review Gate evidence but still verifies independently.
bt-feat-accept section 2 includes Behavior Delta Materialization.

expectations.text: Updates roadmap item and main roadmap doc
expectations.evidence: Existing behavior preserved and used throughout roadmap features.
bt-feat-accept closeout includes optional worklog prompt before scoped commit.
origin/main lacks execution mode vocabulary.

expectations.text: Escalates repeated failed fixes to break-loop
expectations.evidence: origin/main lacks break-loop execution mode.

expectations.text: Requires regression seam or explains why none exists
expectations.evidence: Existing issue-fix has regression test/seam discipline from Matt absorption.

expectations.text: Offers optional worklog after fix closeout
expectations.evidence: origin/main lacks worklog prompt.
bt-issue-analyze maps enhanced diagnose to strict-evidence.

expectations.text: Escalates repeated failed fixes to break-loop
expectations.evidence: bt-issue-analyze/fix include break-loop escalation for repeated failures.

expectations.text: Requires regression seam or explains why none exists
expectations.evidence: bt-issue-fix strict-evidence rules require seam/fresh verification unless explained.

expectations.text: Offers optional worklog after fix closeout
expectations.evidence: bt-issue-fix closeout includes optional worklog prompt.
origin/main lacks worklog skeleton.

expectations.text: Managed reference list includes all new workflow references
expectations.evidence: origin/main lacks several ai-workflow references.

expectations.text: Maintainer notes explain reference parity categories
expectations.evidence: origin/main lacks reference parity audit categories.
Existing onboard already preserves domain-context and project-management.

expectations.text: README/package projection mentions optional Pi runtime breadcrumb
expectations.evidence: origin/main has no pi.extensions or README breadcrumb note.
bt-onboard skeleton includes `.bytetrue/worklog/`.

expectations.text: Managed reference list includes all new workflow references
expectations.evidence: bt-onboard managed list includes execution modes, implementation review, context manifest, subagent handoff, research-first, breadcrumb, and worklog.

expectations.text: Maintainer notes explain reference parity categories
expectations.evidence: current/onboard maintainer notes include Reference Parity Audit categories.
onboard still excludes domain-context and project-management from overwrite.

expectations.text: README/package projection mentions optional Pi runtime breadcrumb
expectations.evidence: README Pi install text mentions optional runtime extension and package has pi.extensions.
